title: Kaizen! Should we build a CDN?
description: Gerhard discusses 2024 goals, migrating PostgreSQL to Neon.tech, troubleshooting persistent CDN cache issues with Fastly, considering building a custom CDN using NGINX on Fly, and exploring a potential job board product.
